title: Product prices update schema
description: A schema for updating a specific product price.

product.description: A reference to the product this product price belongs to.

self.description: A unique reference to the product resource.

currency.description: A reference to the currency this product price is in.

code.description: The ISO 4217 currency code of the invoice.

self.description: A unique reference to the currency resource.
A unique reference to this product-prices resource.
